query:
SELECT task_key AS "task_key!", status AS "status!", fired_at
            FROM project_task_board_items
            WHERE schedule_id = (
                SELECT schedule_id
                FROM project_task_board_items
                WHERE id = $1
            )
              AND id != $1
              AND archived_at IS NULL
              AND schedule_id IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY fired_at DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
            LIMIT $2
